model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible + eligible_post + age + I(age ** 2) + C(year) + C(statefip) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + EVERIFY + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + JAIL287G", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
